title: BUYERS BEWARE Evangelion Platinum Tin
wikitext:
[]: BUYERS BEWARE (Evangelion Platinum Tin)             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Nov 12, 2007 8:36 pm The new Evangelion Platinum Tin DOES NOT come with a platinum Booklet Or at least mine didn't It also does not come out in a fold out mini binder thingy like the U.K release Ugh ADV!!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 12, 2007 9:47 pm Then it looks like I probably won't be upgrading. What extras does it come with (just curious)?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 12, 2007 9:53 pm Apparently the Platinum thinpack Boxset didn't come with those Renewal booklets either. So no surprise there.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Nov 12, 2007 10:01 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: What extras does it come with (just curious)?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 12, 2007 10:02 pm Which were? Are they listed anywhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 12, 2007 10:05 pm The commentary and Tiffany's room. Other random BS like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 12, 2007 10:09 pm That's lame. I thought this was supposed to be THE Eva boxset with all sorts of bonus stuff like the 15th (lol) anniversary boxset promised? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Nov 12, 2007 10:17 pm It's ADV, they look for any way possible to put more DVD sets out. Do you really expect anything different?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 12, 2007 10:55 pm Kind of, but I shouldn't be surprised.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Nov 13, 2007 12:51 am Does anyone out there REALLY want to buy another Eva boxset? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Tue Nov 13, 2007 5:25 am Considering I haven't bought a boxset yet (because I am new to the fandom), yes, yes I do. The thing is, I saw in a video that a user was unpacking a Platinum set with the booklet that looked really detailed and all the DVDs. That is the set I want to get. But I haven't really seen that set around at all.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Tue Nov 13, 2007 8:07 am Word, I'm all about buying a box set. I don't have one yet, just the crappy first release DVDs... I missed out on the fat pack Platinums with the booklets and extras and I refuse to get the slimlines since I'm all about extras. Boo to ADV, for sure :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Nov 13, 2007 2:28 pm Wevangeliwon wrote: Considering I haven't bought a boxset yet (because I am new to the fandom), yes, yes I do. The thing is, I saw in a video that a user was unpacking a Platinum set with the booklet that looked really detailed and all the DVDs. That is the set I want to get. But I haven't really seen that set around at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Nov 15, 2007 9:56 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: The commentary and Tiffany's room. Other random BS like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Nov 15, 2007 8:46 pm Themaninblack wrote: And it has the Directors cut Eps.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Nov 15, 2007 9:39 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Again, that's a special feature? These are what Platinum is .

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Nov 15, 2007 11:18 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Themaninblack wrote: And it has the Directors cut Eps.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Nov 15, 2007 11:53 pm I'm not at my best tonight when it comes to observational skills.
